scripts.verify:env: tsc --outDir .tmp/verify-env --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop scripts/verify-env.ts --skipLibCheck && node .tmp/verify-env/verify-env.js
scripts.smoke:search-docs: tsc --outDir .tmp/search-docs-smoke --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop scripts/smoke-search-docs.ts lib/codeModeDocs.ts --skipLibCheck && node .tmp/search-docs-smoke/scripts/smoke-search-docs.js
scripts.smoke:mcp-proxy: tsc -p tsconfig.mcp-proxy-smoke.json && mkdir -p .tmp/mcp-proxy-smoke/node_modules/@ && ln -sfn ../../lib .tmp/mcp-proxy-smoke/node_modules/@/lib && ASTRAIL_ENABLE_LOCAL_MCP_PROXY_FIXTURES=1 node .tmp/mcp-proxy-smoke/scripts/smoke-mcp-proxy-import.js
scripts.smoke:runtime-policy: tsc --outDir .tmp/runtime-policy-smoke --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop scripts/smoke-runtime-policy-presets.ts --skipLibCheck && node .tmp/runtime-policy-smoke/scripts/smoke-runtime-policy-presets.js
scripts.smoke:waitlist-security: tsc --outDir .tmp/waitlist-security-smoke --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop scripts/smoke-waitlist-security.ts lib/security.ts --skipLibCheck && node .tmp/waitlist-security-smoke/scripts/smoke-waitlist-security.js
scripts.smoke:observability-redaction: tsc --outDir .tmp/observability-redaction-smoke --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop scripts/smoke-observability-redaction.ts lib/runtime/observability.ts --skipLibCheck && node .tmp/observability-redaction-smoke/scripts/smoke-observability-redaction.js
